project_type: React SPA (mind mapping / task management tool called ThoughtFlow)
build_system: Vite 6 with Tailwind CSS 3.4 and PostCSS
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` and confirm it completes without errors. Visually inspect that no references to TaskPanel or taskViewMode remain in the source.
key_patterns: Single-file components in src/. App.jsx is a large monolithic component (~5945 lines) managing all state. Task state: tasks, taskGroups, showTaskPanel, taskViewMode, isSelectingTaskLocation, selectingLocationForTaskId. taskConstants.js exports shared constants (GROUP_COLORS) used by both task views.
directory_structure: src/ contains all components (App.jsx, FullTaskManager.jsx, TaskPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, taskConstants.js, main.jsx, index.css). public/ has static assets. Config at root: vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, package.json.
